title: Avoid using Week Year (YYYY) for date formatting
description: Few developers are aware of the difference between Y for "Week year" and y for Year when formatting and parsing a date with SimpleDateFormat or DateTimeFormatter. This can lead to unexpected results, especially in the first and last weeks of the year.
recommendation: Use y for Year instead of Y for Week Year
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities and incorrect date handling

checks.message: Use y for Year instead of Y for Week Year
